title: OutreachDesk: A Governed AI Drafting Workflow
description: OutreachDesk is a controlled AI outreach drafting system designed to eliminate generic, low-quality outputs. Instead of free-form prompting, it enforces a structured workflow: requires a validated lead record, fails closed if required fields are missing, uses a canonical outreach template, and runs deterministic post-generation checks before marking drafts ready for review. Built in Python with a focus on system design over raw generation. This project explores how to make LLM outputs reliable by combining input contracts, validation layers, and evaluation gates.
